paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.55, representing a 6.94 percent increase from the prior close. However, the stock has declined by 27.03 percent over the past 21 trading sessions.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, which announces the date of Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call. The earnings call is scheduled to take place on August 13, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, which discloses the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed. Additionally, there is one new social post in the last 24 hours, which mentions the stock symbol $FRMI.
